name: aspnet-core-plugin
description: ASP.NET Core backend + database stack provider (priority=100, detects appsettings.json). Provides aspnet-core-architect (Sonnet/medium — Minimal API / MVC, DTOs, FluentValidation, DI, Options, authorization, HTTPS/HSTS, EF Core stubs) and efcore-specialist (Sonnet/low — Fluent API config, migrations, indexes). Adds aspnet-conventions and efcore-patterns skills, dotnet format Stop-hook. Reuses csharp-foundation skills. Designs the API contract for SPA frontend plugins.
